questions.question: What is Gon Freecss's primary motivation for becoming a Hunter?
questions.explanation: Gon wants to understand why being a Hunter was more important to his father, Ging, than staying with him.

questions.question: Who is Gon's best friend and a young member of the famous Zoldyck family?
questions.explanation: Killua Zoldyck is Gon's closest companion, whom he meets during the Hunter Exam.

questions.question: What business is the Zoldyck family famous for?
questions.explanation: The Zoldycks are a legendary and wealthy family of elite elite assassins living on Kukuroo Mountain.

questions.question: What is the name of the spiritual energy and power system in Hunter x Hunter?
questions.explanation: Nen is the technique that allows a living being to use and manipulate their own life energy (aura).

questions.question: Who is the leader of the Phantom Troupe (Genei Ryodan)?
questions.explanation: Chrollo Lucilfer is the founder and leader of the Phantom Troupe, possessing the ability to steal other Nen abilities.
